leadText: Pounce (Japanese: とびつく Pounce) is a damage-dealing Bug-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is TM021 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Pounce inflicts damage and lowers the target's Speed by one stage.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] This move originated as a TCG attack .
